[[commons:Category:Haho-jinja]][[ja:波宝神社]] {{Expand Japanese|波宝神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Hahō Shrine | native_name = 波宝神社 | image = 五條市西吉野町夜中 波宝神社の本殿 Hahō-jinja 2011.7.29 - panoramio.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Hahō Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.311809|135.756501}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Sumiyoshi sanjin|lt=Sumiyoshi sanjin|de|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|en|Sumiyoshi sanjin|it|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|ja|住吉三神|mni|ꯁꯨꯃꯤꯌꯣꯁꯤ ꯁꯟꯖꯤꯟ|my|ဆုမိရောရှိနတ်သုံးပါး|pl|Sumiyoshi Sanjin|simple|Sumiyoshi sanjin|zh|住吉三神|qid=Q1114013|1=Sumiyoshi sanjin}} }} {{nihongo|'''Hahō Shrine'''|波宝神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q32512|ltq=Q32512|qid=Q32512|1=Sumiyoshi Shrine}} * Nara|lt=Yoshino district|ar|مقاطعة يوشينو|ceb|Yoshino-gun|en|Yoshino District, Nara|es|Distrito de Yoshino|fa|یوشینو|fr|District de Yoshino|id|Distrik Yoshino, Nara|it|Distretto di {{ill|lt=Empress Jing?|Q232803|qid=Q232803|lt=Okinagatarashihime-no-Mikoto|1=Empress Jingū}} |?? = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Mount Gimp?|1=UNKNOWN}} ({{ill|lt=shintai-zan|Q1595289|qid=Q1595289|1=Sacred mountains}})[http://www.city.gojo.lg.jp/www/contents/1154584339614/index.html Yoshino Sanzan], [http://www.yasaka.org/yosino/hahono.html] |?? = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (small)
former {{ill|lt=G?-sha|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |?? = {{ill|lt=Kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781|qid=Q3193781|1=Kasuga-zukuri}} |?? = {{ill|lt=October 9|Q2923|qid=Q2923|1=October 9}} |?? = Japan Nara }} '''Hah? Shrine''' (also written ???? / ????; ???????) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Yonaka, {{ill|lt=Goj?|Q602571|qid=Q602571|1=Gojō, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|qid=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is an Engishiki-listed shrine and its former rank was G?-sha. === Chronology === * March, Ten'an 2 ({{ill|lt=858|Q30371|qid=Q30371|1=858}}): became an official shrine * June 23, J?gan 6 ({{ill|lt=864|Q25041|qid=Q25041|1=864}}): Senior Fourth Rank, Lower in ''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|qid=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'' * November 4, J?gan 8 ({{ill|lt=866|Q23872|qid=Q23872|1=866}}): Junior Third Rank in ''Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku'' * August, Bunky? 3 ({{ill|lt=1863|Q7701|qid=Q7701|1=1863}}): Tend?gumi forces placed their headquarters on this mountain * Meiji 6 ({{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|qid=Q7757|1=1873}}): ranked as G?-sha === Local information === * {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|qid=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Goj?|Q602571|qid=Q602571|1=Gojō, Nara}}{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Nishiyoshinoch?|1=UNKNOWN}}{{ill|lt=Nishiyoshinoch? Yonaka|UNKNOWN|lt=Yonaka}} 176 === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === * {{ill|lt=Hahime Shrine|Q38278473|qid=Q38278473|1=Hahime Shrine}} * {{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|qid=Q11433427|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}} === External links === {{Commonscat|Haho-jinja}} * [http://www.city.gojo.lg.jp/www/contents/1146188459276/index.html#14 Shrines, temples, and historic sites of Goj? > Hah? Shrine] - Goj? City * {{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/030909-01.html |title=Hah? Shrine |date=20181001125714}} - Engishiki Shrine Research {{pref-stub|pref=???}} {{Japanese-history-stub}} {{shinto-stub}} {{?? ?}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Hahō Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Hahō Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Hoe offering]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Sumiyoshi shrines]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Gojo]] [[Category:五條市の歴史]][[Category:Sumiyoshi shrines]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]]
